arts.ttl: England vs Greece – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: England continue their UEFA Nations League campaign when the Three Lions host Greece on Thursday night. Both teams have maximum points from two games played in this top-of-the-table clash, with Greece sitting ahead of England on goal difference. arts.ttl: How to watch England vs Greece – TV channel and kick-off time
arts.sum: England resume their Nations League campaign when Greece visit Wembley on Thursday evening. Lee Carsley’s side have taken maximum points from their two Group B 2 games to date, though face a Greece team who sit above them on goal difference after also beating Finland and the Republic of Ireland in September. arts.ttl: George Baldock found dead in pool after wife back in England raised the alarm
arts.sum: Former Premier League defender George Baldock has tragically passed away at the age of 31 in Greece, just months after moving abroad to join Panathinaikos in the summer

arts.ttl: John Stones makes bold Pep Guardiola claim about interim England manager Lee Carsley
